name: Rice Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
1 cup red and green bell peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare rice according to package directions.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Prepare a 13 x 9-inch pan with cooking spray; set aside.
4. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
5. Add chicken, onions, bell peppers, mushrooms, and garlic. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in tomato sauce, tomato paste, oregano, basil, black pepper, and salt. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Layer half of the rice, chicken mixture, cottage cheese, parmesan cheese, and mozzarella cheese in the prepared pan.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Sprinkle with parsley.
10. Bake, covered for 30 minutes.
11. Uncover and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
